visual_description: A man in a plaid shirt stands with arms outstretched, facing slightly away from the camera. Behind him, a woman in a light-colored top sits on a hospital bed, partially obscured, while another man in a light jacket stands nearby, looking toward the bed. A third person’s hand rests on a brown leather bag near the bed, and a fourth person is partially visible on the far right edge of the frame.
audio_description: The audio features a woman speaking with a high-pitched, fast-paced, and loud voice.
